title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading above 158.00, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD long positioning at 71.1% and retail sentiment at 9% long / 91% short, watch for potential squeeze as RBA hiking supports AUD carry.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD, pair holds at 1.1809 as ECB policymaker Muller signals a rate move at the April meeting cannot be ruled out.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 18.2 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +0.80%.

title: Cross-Asset Correlation
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +1.58σ, indicating JPY no longer acting as safe haven, watch for FX positioning implications.
